ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2006 Continued To May-30-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Mar-28-2006 Text Ruling

Minor'S Compromise Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Elinor Leary, Esq. for Petitioner: Rosa Martinez-Aguilar, present with interpreter: Mila Magallanes, were sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $ 75,000.00
$225,000.00 will purchase a structured annuity. Beginning on her 18th birthday, May 17, 2021, Aileen Isabel Martinez-Aguilar will receive (into her personal savings account at Bank of America, 29th/Mission Branch, PO Box 37176, SF 94137) payments of $10,000.00 for 4 years certain. In addition, on her 18th birthday, Aileen will receive monthly payments of $2,111.00 for life with 40 years certain. The total expected benefit of this annuity is $1,780,000.00.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim was signed in open court.
